lighting.shadow_character: 길고 선명하며, 그래픽 요소로 활용된 짙은 그림자

color.grading_style: Lifted blacks with a subtle brown tone for a film-like feel

composition.composition_rule: Rule of Thirds and Triangular Composition

texture.detail_rendering: 경광을 활용하여 오렌지 껍질과 과육의 질감을 극대화함

improvement_notes: 조명: 부드러운 연광으로 교체하여 고급스러운 톤 연출. 색감: 보색(블루/틸)을 활용하여 시각적 임팩트 강화. 구도: 과즙이 흐르는 순간이나 인간적 요소를 추가하여 스토리와 움직임 부여.
nano_banana_prompt: /imagine prompt: A minimalist still life food photography of [YOUR FOOD SUBJECT]. Eye-level shot, straight-on angle. The scene is illuminated by a single hard light source from the top-left, creating sharp, dramatic, long shadows on the right. High contrast. The background is a two-toned solid color surface, clean and simple. The overall color palette is a warm monochromatic scheme, dominated by shades of amber, beige, and orange. Color temperature around 4000K. The style is modern, graphic, and vibrant. Shot on Kodak Portra 400 film, ultra-high detail, sharp focus. --ar 4:5 --style raw
